calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Alan Horwitz, Esq. for Plaintiff: Fillmore Center Associates, LP, aka Fillmore Properties, LLC.
Plaintiff's witness: Mr. Solis, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Livia Lill.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement-------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1420 Turk St., #809, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,821.23
Attorney's Fees $500.00
Costs $206.30, for a Total of $2,527.53
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court
Judgment signed in open court.
